onboarding.tagline: Your health navigator. In your language.
onboarding.situation_title: How can we help you today?
onboarding.situation_subtitle: Select the option that best describes your situation
onboarding.situation_no_insurance_desc: Find affordable clinics and support near you.
onboarding.situation_undocumented_desc: Get confidential care without fear of legal repercussions.
onboarding.situation_mental_health_desc: Connect with therapists who understand your culture.
onboarding.situation_insured: I have insurance but need help
onboarding.situation_insured_desc: Simplify your benefits and navigate the complex system.

chat.placeholder: Describe your symptoms or ask a question...
chat.title: Health Triage
chat.subtitle: Tell us how you're feeling. Our AI guide helps you find the right care instantly.
chat.opening_no_insurance: Hi, I'm Clínica. I'm here to help you find affordable care, with or without insurance. What's going on today?
chat.opening_undocumented: Hi. Everything you share here is private. I'm here to help you find safe care. What's going on?
chat.opening_mental_health: Hi, I'm Clínica. It takes courage to reach out. Tell me a little about what you've been feeling lately.
chat.opening_insured: Hi! I'm here to help you understand your options. What's going on with your health today?
chat.disclaimer: Clínica AI provides guidance based on public health data. If you are experiencing a medical emergency, please call 911 immediately.

map.callout_title: Your safety is protected by federal law
map.callout_body: All clinics marked ✦ are Federally Qualified Health Centers (FQHCs). By law, they must serve all patients regardless of insurance or immigration status. They will not report you.

footer.copyright: © 2026 Clínica Health Navigation. Empowering Hispanic Communities.
